info.name: HubSpot CRM Tickets API
info.description:
Tickets represent customer requests for help and are tracked through support pipelines until resolved. The tickets endpoints allow you to create, manage, and retrieve customer support ticket records and associate them with contacts, companies, and other CRM objects.

Contact Support:
 Name: HubSpot Developer Support

variable.description: (Required) The type of the object to associate with.
(Required) The ID of the object to associate with.
(Required) The type of association to create.

request.description: Creates an association between a ticket and another CRM object record. The association type specifies the relationship between the objects.

response.name: Association created successfully.

variable.description: (Required) The type of the associated object.
(Required) The ID of the associated object.
(Required) The type of association to delete.

request.description: Removes an association between a ticket and another CRM object record. This does not delete the ticket or the associated object, only the relationship between them.

response.name: Association deleted successfully.

request.description: Returns all associations of a ticket record to objects of a specified type, such as contacts, companies, or deals.
